tts_voice.description: GizClaw voice resource name used by an external TTS path.

speaker_id.description: AST s2s built-in or custom speaker id.

translation_model.description: GizClaw model resource used to resolve the Volc tenant credential for AST translate.

e2e.description: Marks seed resources used by the local e2e harness.

lang_pair.description: AST language pair, for example zh/en or en/zh. Use auto for automatic Chinese/English mode.

ttl.description: Unified retention duration for chat history entries and their assets.

asr_model.description: GizClaw ASR model resource used to transcribe gear audio.

enabled.description: Whether gear audio should be transcribed and written as text in workspace history.

ttl.description: Workspace-level retention override for chat history entries and their assets.

asr_model.description: Workspace-level ASR model override for gear audio transcription.

enabled.description: Whether gear audio should be transcribed and written as text in workspace history.

CredentialBody.description: Provider-specific credential payload. The shape is selected by Credential.provider.

model.description: GizClaw Model resource name. The upstream Doubao model version is configured on Model provider_data.upstream_model.

e2e.description: Marks seed resources used by the local e2e harness.

model.description: GizClaw Model resource name. Defaults to Workflow.spec.doubao_realtime.model.

content_type.description: Optional content type captured during upload.

path.description: Server-owned objectstore path for the uploaded artifact payload.

sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 digest for integrity checks.

FirmwareArtifactKind.description: Kind of payload carried by a firmware artifact.

artifacts.description: Device-defined artifact list for this slot.

initiative.description: Who starts the conversation when the workspace runtime opens.

e2e.description: Marks seed resources used by the local e2e harness.

ModelProviderData.description: Provider-specific model runtime configuration. The shape is selected by Model.provider.kind.

ModelProviderKind.description: Provider resource kind usable by model runtime.

ModelSource.description: How the model entered the global catalog

level_param.description: Optional provider request parameter used for the selected thinking level or budget.

param.description: Provider request parameter mapping, such as reasoning_effort, thinking.type, or enable_thinking.

gear_id.description: Originating gear id. Required for gear entries and omitted for agent entries.

name.description: Stable workflow ID. The creator must provide this value.

last_active_at.description: Last user-visible workspace conversation or history activity time. Configuration-only updates must not modify this field.

WorkspaceParameters.description: Agent-specific workspace parameters. The shape is selected by agent_type.
